title: 5 Tips for Deploying AI Agents to Production
summary: AWS Developers outlines five production best practices for deploying AI agents: streaming tool call events for responsiveness, layered authentication with API Gateway and Cognito, contracted database access with tenant isolation, guardrails and cost budgets via lifecycle hooks, and observability through metrics and OpenTelemetry tracing. The patterns apply across platforms but are demonstrated using AWS services and the Strands Agents SDK.
